title: ExperimentOutcome (DiD decision record)
description: Internal decision record of a Difference-in-Differences (DiD) measurement for a registered experiment over its 7-day window, plus the B-layer verdict. This is the CLOSED internal record (additionalProperties:false) mirroring the fields projected by event/experiment-outcome-observed/v1; the event is the thin notification, this domain contract is the fuller stored decision. Determinism: the DiD computation is deterministic — given identical registered inputs, observation set, and GRS policy hash, the net_of_control_lift and b_verdict are byte-reproducible (wave5-plan.md E3 '3x determinism'; ALG §11.3 reproducibility 100%).
$comment: compat_class: closed (additionalProperties:false at root, like every other domain record — audit-event, entity-record, experiment-registration), signed: false (this is an internal DiD decision record, NOT a human-signature artifact; contrast domain/experiment-registration signed:true which carries created_by/approved_by human approval). Authority: docs/architecture/wave5-plan.md deliverables 1-4 (DiD, B-gate, evidence), E3/E4, Human decisions H3 (independent-layer definition) and H4 (outcome_layer enum). Fields mirror event/experiment-outcome-observed/v1 (the notification projection) with an added undetermined_reason typed-code array for the UNDETERMINED branch (E4: insufficient/contaminated/late => UNDETERMINED + reason code). engine_id root-referenced (chatgpt-search only) like domain/experiment-registration and domain/platform-observation (root $ref usage, not the payload activation fragment). All refs/hashes are content-addressed anchors — NO raw customer content inline (wave5-plan.md non-scope). The B-gate >=2-independent-layer PASS rule and the duplicate-basis-counted-once rule (H3) are applied by the w5-06 b_gate guard over per_signal_results[]; this schema stores the result, it does not itself enforce the >=2 policy (an in-schema count constraint would still not capture 'independent' — distinct evidence_basis_id — so the guard is the sole authority, honestly).

engine_id.$comment: chatgpt-search only (root type reference, mirrors domain/experiment-registration.engine_id usage).

registration_canonical_hash.$comment: Immutable preregistration canonical hash this outcome is measured against.

deployment_confirmation_ref.$comment: deployment_id of the deployment.confirmed.v1 signal that started the window clock.

outcome_layer.$comment: H4 enum (ALG §3.5:159); 'absorption' = data-model value only, not P1 model activation; conversion excluded.

evidence_basis_id.$comment: Distinct evidence basis (H3): the B-gate counts a layer toward its >=2-independent requirement only with a distinct evidence_basis_id (duplicate basis counted once).

net_of_control_lift.$comment: Deterministic DiD estimate: treatment delta net of control delta (w5-05).

undetermined_reason.$comment: Typed reason codes (H7 code-level enum v1, snake_case) explaining an UNDETERMINED verdict (e.g. insufficient_sample, contaminated_control, late_deployment). Present/meaningful for b_verdict=undetermined; the canonical vocabulary is a w5-06 obligation.

raw_view.$comment: Raw un-adjusted view — MUST accompany control_adjusted_view (ALG §11.3:674-676). Interior open by design (nested per-metric raw figures); root of THIS domain record stays closed.

control_adjusted_view.$comment: Control-adjusted (net-of-control) view — MUST accompany raw_view. Interior open by design.

determinism_note.$comment: Human/audit note asserting the DiD determinism invariant for this record: identical (registration hash + observation set + grs_policy.hash) reproduce identical net_of_control_lift and b_verdict (E3, 3x determinism).
